title: Anthropic invites the public to ask harder questions about AI
friendlyTitle: Anthropic asks people what worries them about AI
summary: Anthropic launched a public-facing “hard questions” initiative, asking people to submit concerns and hopes about AI and saying it will chart progress toward its public-benefit goals.
friendlySummary: Anthropic is inviting the public to share tough questions about AI, including jobs, safety, children, science, and human agency.
whyItMatters: The initiative is not a technical release, but it reflects a larger shift: AI companies are being pushed to explain their social, economic, and safety choices in plain language. Users and businesses should expect more transparency demands as AI becomes infrastructure.
friendlyWhyItMatters: AI affects everyday life, so people need clearer answers from the companies building it.
